$comment: Copy to <project>/.claude/praxarch.json to override praxarch defaults for this project. Every key is optional — omit anything you don't want to override. Project config merges over global (~/.claude/praxarch/config.json), which merges over built-in defaults.

roleModelOverrides.$comment: Force a role to a specific model tier for this project, e.g. downgrade executor in a low-stakes repo.

verifyGate.$comment: Thresholds that trigger the Stop-hook verification requirement, and paths excluded from the size calculation.

routeGuard.$comment: strict:false turns hard denials into warnings. securityKeywords are ADDED to the built-in set that forces routing to security-executor.
